name: Superior Industries Europe AG
summary: Superior Industries Europe AG develops, manufactures, and distributes alloy rims and wheels, and other components for the automotive and accessory sectors. It provides its wheels under the ATS, Rial, Alutec, and Anzio brands to tire and wheel retail chains, wholesalers, retailers, and car dealers. The company was founded in 2005 and is headquartered in Bad Durkheim, Germany. Superior Industries Europe AG is a subsidiary of Superior Industries International, Inc.
